NOTE: Surface-to-lemma overrides. Keys are case-folded surface forms as they appear in vocab.surfaces; values are the citation-form lemma string. The heuristic in buildSurfaceLemma handles the bulk of regular inflections; this file covers what it cannot: suppletive forms (irregular verbs) and archaic conjugations. Extend this file on inspection of the generated table whenever the heuristic produces a wrong or opaque result.
